## Testing

- [ ] New or updated unit tests added
- [ ] Integration tests pass (`go test ./test/integration/...`)
- [ ] Race detector passes (`go test -race ./...`)
- [ ] Coverage remains ≥ 70% (`bash scripts/check-local.sh`)

## For UI changes

- [ ] Tested with `--dry-run` (no files removed during development)
- [ ] Confirm modal was exercised
- [ ] Narrow terminal (< 80 columns) renders correctly

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (`gofmt`, `go vet`)
- [ ] All messages are in English
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] No new secrets or credentials committed
